'''tagocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabella|sabella]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabella|sabella]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tagocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tægecheth|tægecheth]] || [[word:tægechej|tægechej]] || [[word:tægechesh|tægechesh]] || [[word:tægeche|tægeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tagogochoth|tagogochoth]] || [[word:tagogochoj|tagogochoj]] || [[word:tagogochosh|tagogochosh]] || [[word:tagogocho|tagogocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tagochoth|tagochoth]] || [[word:tagochoj|tagochoj]] || [[word:tagochosh|tagochosh]] || [[word:tagocho|tagocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tagofchoth|tagofchoth]] || [[word:tagofchoj|tagofchoj]] || [[word:tagofchosh|tagofchosh]] || [[word:tagofchof|tagofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tagochotho|tagochotho]] || [[word:tagochojo|tagochojo]] || [[word:tagochosho|tagochosho]] || [[word:tagochoko|tagochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tagochoth|tagochoth]] || [[word:tagochoj|tagochoj]] || [[word:tagochosh|tagochosh]] || [[word:tagocho|tagocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tagochothol|tagochothol]] || [[word:tagochojol|tagochojol]] || [[word:tagochoshol|tagochoshol]] || [[word:tagochokol|tagochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tagochothotho|tagochothotho]] || [[word:tagochojojo|tagochojojo]] || [[word:tagochoshosho|tagochoshosho]] || [[word:tagochoko|tagochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tagochothon|tagochothon]] || [[word:tagochojon|tagochojon]] || [[word:tagochoshon|tagochoshon]] || [[word:tagochokon|tagochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tagochothoro|tagochothoro]] || [[word:tagochojoro|tagochojoro]] || [[word:tagochoshoro|tagochoshoro]] || [[word:tagochokoro|tagochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
